markdown:
#  Download Submittals Attachments (iOS) 
##  Background 
Downloading a submittal's attachments allows you to access these items when in offline mode.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:** 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Submittals tool.


##  Steps 
Navigate to the **Submittals** tool on an iOS mobile device.
#### Download the Attachments of an Individual Submittal
  1. Tap **Download**
![Submittals Ios Download Submittal Attachment](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/c64605d0ef5cf579a73e3b21a0b10b5a/d0a653edffee7f7fbbd4bc229aca1bb9/submittals-ios-download-submittal-attachment.png?fm=webp)
Once the submittal attachments have been successfully downloaded, a checkmark ![Icon Checkmark](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/fb790ca025ab8263bb70876fff439d20/e2e670201b885a1cdfd50585e9601316/icon-checkmark.png?fm=webp&h=19) icon will momentarily display in place of the download icon. You can now access the submittal attachments in offline mode.


#### Download the Attachments of all Submittals
  1. Tap **Download**
![Submittals Ios Download All Submittal Attachments](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8cc2ecbf1ea4a726a82847670e16f9f4/20a3c5acac9cbb50f91498d302fab4b9/submittals-ios-download-all-submittal-attachments.png?fm=webp)
  2. Once the submittal attachments have been successfully downloaded, the download icon will change to a checkmark ![Icon Checkmark](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/fb790ca025ab8263bb70876fff439d20/e2e670201b885a1cdfd50585e9601316/icon-checkmark.png?fm=webp&h=19) icon. You can now access the submittal attachments in offline mode. _Note:_ After navigating away from the submittal, the checkmark will no longer be present upon return. If there is no download icon, the submittal has already been downloaded and can be viewed in offline mode.


## See Also
  * [View a Submittal (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-ios/tutorials/view-a-submittal-ios)
  * [Submittals (iOS) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-ios/permissions)
  * [View Submittal PDF Attachments (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-ios/tutorials/view-submittal-pdf-attachments-ios)
title: Download Submittals Attachments (iOS)
description: How to download a submittal's attachments on an iOS mobile device.
